sections.content: Cross Country Ski Trail Conditions as of March 6, 2026 –
Due to trail conditions Bucks Run will be closed for the season.  Thank you for a great one!

Nubs Nob (Harbor Springs).conditions: The morning sweet spot for the last 3 days has been awesome . The groomers are taking full advantage of the 20 inch hardpack base .

Huron Meadows Metropark (Brighton).conditions: Excellent again. Fresh groom/till this AM held up well…fast and hard. Probably another day left tomorrow since it will freeze again tonight.

nubsNob.liftsOpen: 6 chairlifts, space worm and the rope tow.
nubsNob.xcTrails: Trails are soft and in poor condition for skiing today. Coverage is still Ok.
nubsNob.nightSkiing: Night Skiing is Tuesday thru Saturday from 5:30 to 9:00 p.m. Night skiing ends on March 14.
nubsNob.comments: It is wet start to the day with a soaking rain overnight. Expect wet snow today and variable conditions. Visibility will be low on the slopes this morning as there is a dense fog at the ski area. It does look like the rain will move out of the area by the afternoon. The soup of the day is split pea and ham. Pintail Peak Lodge is open with an espresso bar. NASTAR racing and the Nub's Nob Open are cancelled today due to snow conditions. The lifts will spin from 9:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m. with an hour break at 4:30 p.m. Despite the early spring weather, make it a great day at Nub's Nob.
